title: Monsoon Moist Argentinian Sea Bass Bowl
description: A resinous and chewy Argentinian dish featuring sea bass, served with fry-grind-rice-khao-khua in an earthenware bowl, perfect for a monsoon evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the sea bass fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the sea bass with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Sear the sea bass fillets for 2 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8 minutes.
While the sea bass is baking, cook the uncooked white rice according to package instructions.
Mix the cooked white rice with grind rice khao khuay and argentinian chimichurri sauce.
To serve, place a sea bass fillet in an earthenware bowl and top with the rice mixture and chopped parsley.
